# ECOMSOL - Multi-Category E-Commerce Catalog

> ECOMSOL (ecomsol.store) is a multi-category e-commerce platform curating quality products from trusted marketplaces. All purchases redirect to external marketplaces (Etsy, Amazon) with full buyer protection.

## Current Categories

### Faux Fur Accessories
Handcrafted faux fur costume accessories for cosplay, conventions, and everyday style.

**Subcategories:**
- Ears (39 products) - Animal ear headbands: cat, fox, wolf, bunny
- Ears & Tail Sets (8 products) - Matching ear and tail bundles
- Costume Sets (5 products) - Multi-piece: ears, paws, masks, tails
- Paws & Gloves (1 product) - Furry handpaws with claws

**Price range:** $38-$110
**Materials:** Premium faux fur, metal headbands, wire cores, belt straps
**Total products:** 53

## Key Facts
- All faux fur products are original designs, 100% cruelty-free
- Ships worldwide within 3-5 business days
- All purchases through Etsy shop (etsy.com/shop/ecomsolstore)
- Built to scale to many product categories over time

## Site Structure
- Homepage: /
- All Products: /shop
- Product Pages: /shop/[product-slug]
- Categories: /category/[category-slug]
- Subcategories: /category/[category-slug]/[subcategory-slug]
- About: /about
- FAQ: /faq

## Contact
- Etsy Shop: https://www.etsy.com/shop/ecomsolstore
- Email: hello@ecomsol.store
